local_results.title: Portland Farmers Market at PSU
local_results.user_review: "The aroma of live cooking and freshly picked produce is a foodies dream."

local_results.title: Montavilla Farmers Market
local_results.description: Year-round spot with locally grown foods. Farmer's market open year-round that features local produce & other foods from rotating vendors.
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful variety of locally grown produce, locally made products"

local_results.title: Hollywood Farmers Market
local_results.description: Produce, crafts, honey and baked goods are sold at this farmers' market, often with live music and coffee.
local_results.user_review: "A really great selection of local organic veggies."

local_results.title: Woodstock Farmers Market
local_results.description: Sunday market for produce & local foods. Outdoor market (Sundays, June-October) offering products from area growers & food artisans.
local_results.user_review: "So much selection and tons of lovely people."

local_results.title: St. Johns Farmers Market
local_results.address: N Charleston Ave &, N Central St, Portland, OR 97203
local_results.description: Market showcasing the area's crops, plus a mix of baked goods, flowers and other farm-fresh products.
local_results.user_review: "Purple asparagus is amazing, very fresh produce with great variety."

local_results.title: Growers Outlet.
local_results.address: Parking lot, 16145 NE Glisan St, Portland, OR 97230
local_results.description: Year-round farmer's greenmarket. Farmer's market offering seasonal produce from local vendors, plus gourmet foods & a garden center.
local_results.user_review: "The fruit and veg are fresh, fantastic, and locally sourced."

local_results.title: Hillsdale Farmers' Market
local_results.description: Compact, quaint and welcoming market offering baked goods, produce, meats and seafood, plus prepared fare.
local_results.user_review: "Love the people, love the freshness of the produce and the products."

local_results.title: Beaverton Farmers Market
local_results.description: Large weekly event with fresh produce, flowers and baked goods.
local_results.user_review: "Good variety of produce and prepared foods - vegetarian, vegan, gluten free."

local_results.title: Portland Farmers Market - Shemanski Park
local_results.description: Under a canopy of trees, this weekly market offers a wide range of farm-fresh and locally-made foods.
local_results.user_review: "The variety of fruits and berries is splendid."

local_results.title: Portland Farmers Market - King
local_results.address: NE Wygant St &, NE 7th Ave, Portland, OR 97211
local_results.description: Seasonal market open on Sundays. This seasonal farmer's market open on Sundays hosts local produce & specialty-food vendors.
local_results.user_review: "Kinda spendy but fresh produce and authentic honey."

local_results.title: Rocky Butte Farmers Market
local_results.address: NE Siskiyou and, NE 80th Ave, Portland, OR 97213
local_results.user_review: "Fresh locally grown fruits and veggies!"

local_results.title: OHSU Farmers Market
local_results.description: Seasonal spot for local foods & goods. Weekly summertime market featuring local fruits & veggies, yogurt, sweets, flowers & prepared eats.
local_results.user_review: "From the fresh vegetables, flowers and the baked goods."

local_results.title: Sellwood Moreland Farmers Market
local_results.user_review: "Excellent the food fresh and the price good"

local_results.title: Berry Good Produce / Parsons Farms
local_results.description: Family-run produce & plant market. Family-owned indoor-outdoor market offering fruits, vegetables & plants, many grown locally.
local_results.user_review: "Their produce is so fresh and delicious."

local_results.title: Bella Organic Farm
local_results.description: Organic produce, corn maze & hay rides. Vast family-run farm featuring organic fruits & vegetables, a seasonal corn maze & kids' activities.
local_results.user_review: "All types of peppers, tomatoes,  squash, (pumpkins) beautiful farm."

local_results.title: Portland Farmers Market - Lents International
local_results.description: Produce, eggs & condiments, Sundays only. Market operating on Sundays with fresh fruit & vegetables, eggs & locally made condiments.
local_results.user_review: "... produce and meat prices are better compared to PSU farmers market ..."

local_results.title: People's Food Co-op
local_results.description: Emporium for locavores & organic goods. Grocer offering local, organic & sustainable food items plus an on-site, year-round farmer's market.
local_results.user_review: "The produce section is in unparalleled in organic and farm direct offerings."

local_results.title: Cedar Mill Farmer's Market
local_results.user_review: "The easy access and amazing product & people!"

local_results.title: Portland Farmers Market - Kenton
local_results.user_review:
"Friendly...good quality
Best vendors"

local_results.title: Lake Oswego Farmers' Market
local_results.description: Bustling market showcasing local produce and baked goods, along with food vendors, flowers, and arts and crafts.
local_results.user_review: "Amazing produce, cherries,blueberries,  tomatoes, and so much more."
